## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, local runtime data, databases, model artifacts, or files under `var/`.
- [ ] I updated tests or explained why tests are not needed.
- [ ] I updated README/docs/wiki/specs when behavior or architecture changed.
- [ ] I checked for stale compatibility paths or deprecated design references.
- [ ] This change does not provide investment advice or promise trading returns.
